title: Backend Developer Vacancy at AgroStar Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at AgroStar Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AgroStar Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
